description: The wider cargo test --lib compiler2:: sweep still has port_type_infer failures unrelated to the raw IR provider-boundary migration: enum_reduce_range_settles_to_int and mixed_enum_take_calls_preserve_list_and_range_activations remain unresolved at MaterializeRoot(RootId(0)); corpus_folds_settle_myreduce_to_int_fold_state_machine, enum_reduce_named_ref_ok_settles_to_int, and fixpoint_leaves_no_reached_fn_unknown_fold_state_machine fatal during IndexCode. Investigate with telemetry and fix the semantic/source/type-infer convergence path without reintroducing old-world planner shims.
title: Compiler2 type-infer sweep: recover Enum.reduce range/named-ref/fold-state-machine convergence
